rationale: No headlines this cycle directly affect Portugal; Iran deal uncertainty continues as background noise on energy prices, but no new development.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal: signing claimed by Trump, disputed by Tehran
top_events.summary: Unresolved Iran deal keeps mild uncertainty over EU energy prices, with indirect relevance to Portugal's cost of living. No confirmed change this cycle.

top_events.title: Israel attacks Beirut amid Iran deal uncertainty
top_events.summary: Escalation in Lebanon adds instability to the Middle East, keeping energy market risk slightly elevated — a distant but non-zero concern for Portugal's import costs.
